marketState: neutral-to-bearish on a 3-12wk horizon, with a near-term bullish weather tilt
summary: NG front trades at $2.915, almost exactly on the model's fair value ($2.917, band $2.42-$3.42), with next-month at $2.881 (slight backwardation, -$0.034). longTerm.rationale: 16y seasonality gives only 31% odds of a higher price in 4 weeks with a -3.1% typical move; storage is +184 Bcf above the 5y average with a bearish +72 Bcf build surprise; COT shows managed money net short (-60.3k, 35th percentile) and 1d/1w technicals confirm a bearish trend (50<200 EMA, RSI 35-37, negative MACD).
